message:
fix(freeze): dup values before passing to property-setting functions

JS_SetPropertyStr, JS_SetProperty, and setPropertyUint32 all consume their
value arguments. This fix ensures we dup values before passing them, preventing
use-after-free crashes.

Fixed locations:
- put_field opcode: dup value before setPropertyStr
- put_array_el opcode: dup value before setPropertyUint32/JS_SetProperty
- define_array_el opcode: dup value before JS_SetProperty
- define_field opcode: dup value before definePropertyStr
- array_from opcode: dup values before setPropertyUint32
- native Array.push: dup values before setPropertyUint32

Also includes:
- toBool -> toBoolWithCtx for proper string truthiness (empty string is falsy)
- eq/neq using eqWithCtx/neqWithCtx for proper string comparison
- arg_shadow cleanup at function exit to prevent memory leaks
